objections.lead_text: That sounds good, but that sounds like a scam too.
Yes, I don't know, but I'm not sure.

rm_handoff.summary: Lead, Danny, is a financial professional interested in increasing earnings from clients' trades. He was initially skeptical and hesitant to share trading volumes but was convinced by the benefits of higher payouts, zero joining fees, and daily payouts. He provided his name and number for signup. He briefly asked about platform features but indicated he didn't have time for a detailed discussion right now. The RM should follow up to ensure his account is activated and to provide an overview of the Rupeezy platform and its dashboard features.

post_call_summary: Lead Danny, an English-speaking financial professional, showed high interest in Rupeezy's higher payouts and daily settlement, agreeing to sign up immediately and providing his details. He briefly inquired about platform features but deferred a detailed discussion. Classify as Hot. An RM should follow up to confirm account activation and provide a comprehensive demo of the RISE portal at his convenience.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: Sir, quick question — if someone in your field was earning more from the same clients, you'd want to know how, right?

conversation.speaker: lead
conversation.text: Yes, but why you?

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: Of course — we're not just another platform. We actually give partners like you higher payouts on every trade compared to what most brokers offer. That means more earnings from the same clients you already have.

conversation.speaker: lead
conversation.text: That sounds good, but that sounds like a scam too.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: I get why you'd think that — a lot of platforms make big promises. But we're backed by a regulated entity and our partners are already seeing the difference in their payouts. Have you ever compared what you're earning per trade with your current setup?

conversation.speaker: lead
conversation.text: Yes, I did try seeing it.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: That's smart — most people don't even check. So you already know there's room to earn more from the same effort. What kind of trading volume are you and your clients doing roughly?

conversation.speaker: lead
conversation.text: What do you mean by trading volumes?

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: I mean the total value of trades your clients place in a month — it could be in lakhs or crores. That usually gives a clear idea of how much extra you could be earning with a better payout structure.

conversation.speaker: lead
conversation.text: I can't reveal it, man.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: Totally get it — privacy matters. No need for exact numbers. Just thinking, if you're handling even a moderate volume, a better payout structure could make a noticeable difference in your earnings. Ever thought about that side of things?

conversation.speaker: lead
conversation.text: Yes, I don't know, but I'm not sure.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: Fair enough — it’s natural to be unsure when something new comes up. But just imagine, if you could keep everything the same — same clients, same work — but earn more per trade, wouldn’t that be worth exploring?

conversation.speaker: lead
conversation.text: Yes, that makes sense.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: Exactly. And the best part is, there’s zero joining fee — so you can test it out without any upfront cost. How does that sound?

conversation.speaker: lead
conversation.text: So there are no hidden charges at all?

conversation.speaker: lead
conversation.text: No.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: That's right — no hidden charges, no joining fee. Everything is transparent, and your earnings are yours to keep. Would you be open to seeing how the numbers compare with what you're currently getting?

conversation.speaker: lead
conversation.text: Yes, sure. Why not?

conversation.speaker: lead
conversation.text: Okay.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: Great. I'll share the details right away — you'll see the exact breakdown per trade. Just to make it relevant, what's the average size of trades your clients usually place?

conversation.speaker: lead
conversation.text: I would say around, like, 10,000 dollars or something.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: Perfect — that’s a solid volume. With that, you’d see a clear difference in your daily payouts compared to traditional brokers. Ready to see how much more you could be earning?

conversation.speaker: lead
conversation.text: Yes. Let's suppose if I have a client who has, like, 10,000 rupees in daily trade, how much more profit I would be getting? Can you explain that to me?

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: Absolutely. Let's say a client trades with ₹10,000 daily — with our higher brokerage sharing, you could earn significantly more per trade compared to standard brokers. For example, if your current broker gives you ₹50 per trade, with us it could go up to ₹80 or even ₹100 based on volume. That adds up fast day by day.

conversation.speaker: lead
conversation.text: Okay, that makes sense.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: And since payouts happen daily, you don’t have to wait for end-of-month settlements. Everything gets credited straight to your account by the next morning. How does that sound for managing your cash flow?

conversation.speaker: lead
conversation.text: It sounds amazing. That's a lot that you are offering right now.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: Glad you see the value. Many partners switch for exactly that reason — consistent daily earnings and higher payouts without the wait. Would you like me to help you get started right away?

conversation.speaker: lead
conversation.text: Yes, sure.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: Perfect. I’ll quickly guide you through the signup — it’s just a few details and you can begin right after. Should we start?

conversation.speaker: lead
conversation.text: Yes, sure.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: Great. Let’s begin with your name and phone number — I’ll set up your partner account right away.

conversation.speaker: lead
conversation.text: Uh, my name is Danny, and my phone number is 929-286-8678.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: Thanks, Danny. I’ve noted your details — your account is being created. You’ll receive a confirmation SMS shortly. Welcome to Rupeezy!

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text:
(interrupting gently)  
You’ll get all the login details and next steps over SMS in a moment — keep an eye on your phone. Anything else you’d like to know before we wrap up?

conversation.speaker: lead
conversation.text: Oh, that's great. How-

conversation.speaker: lead
conversation.text: Mm-hmm ... do I know more about the features that you are giving to me if I wanna go through the platform?

conversation.speaker: lead
conversation.text: Mm-hmm.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: Sure thing. One of the key features is instant, daily payouts — no waiting for end-of-month settlements. Plus, you get a clear dashboard to track all your earnings and client activity in real time. Want me to walk you through how it works once you’re in?

conversation.speaker: lead
conversation.text: I don't think so. Not right now. I don't have time for that. Let's do it some other day.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: No problem at all — take your time. You’ll get all the details over SMS once your account is active. Feel free to explore whenever you’re ready.

conversation.speaker: lead
conversation.text: Okay. Thank you.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: You're welcome, Danny. We're glad to have you onboard.

conversation.speaker: lead
conversation.text: Disconnect the call.
